title: A teaspoon of this weighs billions of tons #Shorts
desc: One level teaspoon of a certain material would weigh billions of tons on Earth, about 900 times the mass of the Great Pyramid of Giza. It is a spoonful of a dead star, a neutron star, the collapsed core of a giant star that exploded and crushed more than the Sun's mass into a ball only about twelve miles across. Short of a black hole, it is the densest thing in the universe.
